content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, the covalently bonded neighbour atoms of atom index 31 (Carbon) are:

- Atom index 30 (element: C)
- Atom index 32 (element: C)
- Atom index 38 (element: H)

The geomconf_index is 4552.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 31 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
